3314310.name: Cursed House 14
3314310.description:
The Cursed House series offers a more challenging take on Match 3 games, combining traditional mechanics with an engaging puzzle design that demands strategic thinking. Beyond just matching tiles, players must navigate through:

  • 90 unique Match 3 levels that come with an interactive hint system to guide you through tougher spots.

  • 8 Spot the Difference scenes.

  • 25 Diamond games.

  • 15 Solitaire games.

The series also features a Relaxed or Limited Moves mode for players seeking even greater challenge, as these modes require careful planning to optimize moves.
